basics.name: Tanmayee Parida
basics.label: PhD Candidate in Physics
basics.summary: PhD candidate in Physics at Shiv Nadar Institution of Eminence, specializing in nano-electronics, non-volatile memory, memristors, neuromorphic hardware, and 2D materials. GATE and JAM qualified with publications in Small, Advanced Materials Technologies, Nanotechnology, and NPG Asia Materials.
